extra_commands: cd /tmp && npx --yes lighthouse https://qrbanner.com --preset=desktop --only-categories=performance --chrome-flags='--headless=new --no-sandbox --disable-gpu --disable-dev-shm-usage' --output=json --output-path=/tmp/lhh.json --quiet 2>/dev/null && node -e "const r=require('/tmp/lhh.json');const a=r.audits;console.log('HOME_PERF='+Math.round(r.categories.performance.score*100),'LCP='+a['largest-contentful-paint'].displayValue,'TBT='+a['total-blocking-time'].displayValue,'CLS='+a['cumulative-layout-shift'].displayValue)" || echo LH_SKIPPED
